title: Big Yellow Taxi
why_this_song: Big Yellow Taxi by Joni Mitchell (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Don't it always seem to go"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "They paved paradise, put up a parking lot"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Don't it always seem to go

Don't it always seem to go

I said don't it always seem to go

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "paved" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "paved" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Big Yellow Taxi" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Big Yellow Taxi" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Big Yellow Taxi" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Big Yellow Taxi", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Big Yellow Taxi" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Big Yellow Taxi" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
